NO.Kystverket.AIS.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for Kystverket AIS CloudEvents on the `ais` topic keyed by `{mmsi}`.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for Kystverket AIS CloudEvents using the topic hierarchy and retain settings declared in this manifest.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for kystverket-ais CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.PositionReportClassA.name: PositionReportClassA
NO.Kystverket.AIS.PositionReportClassA.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.StaticVoyageData.name: StaticVoyageData
NO.Kystverket.AIS.StaticVoyageData.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.PositionReportClassB.name: PositionReportClassB
NO.Kystverket.AIS.PositionReportClassB.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.StaticDataClassB.name: StaticDataClassB
NO.Kystverket.AIS.StaticDataClassB.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.AidToNavigation.name: AidToNavigation
NO.Kystverket.AIS.AidToNavigation.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.PositionReport.name: PositionReport
NO.Kystverket.AIS.PositionReport.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.ShipStatic.name: ShipStatic
NO.Kystverket.AIS.ShipStatic.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.description: Events from Kystverket AIS covering AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters. Reference records identify transport resources; realtime records carry the current source status, measurement, or movement update.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the Kystverket AIS events. It carries the same transport semantics as the base events with MQTT topic routing and retain behavior declared per message.

NO.Kystverket.AIS.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of the kystverket-ais events. It carries the same source event semantics for brokers and services that consume AMQP messages.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key identity for this event family.

flag.description: Routing axis 'flag' copied from the source event so AMQP brokers and Service Bus subscriptions can filter without decoding the payload.

ship_type.description: Routing axis 'ship_type' copied from the source event so AMQP brokers and Service Bus subscriptions can filter without decoding the payload.

geohash5.description: Routing axis 'geohash5' copied from the source event so AMQP brokers and Service Bus subscriptions can filter without decoding the payload.

schema.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

schema.name: AidToNavigation
schema.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

mmsi.description: Source MMSI as a 9-digit ASCII string (padded with leading zeros). Used as the UNS topic '{mmsi}' placeholder and as the CloudEvents subject.

flag.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lower-case) derived from the first three digits of the MMSI via the ITU MID (Maritime Identification Digit) registry. 'xx' is used for MIDs that do not map to a country.

ship_type.description: Kebab-case ship-type bucket derived from the ITU-R M.1371 ShipType code. For static reports it is derived from the broadcast Type-5/24 ShipType field; for position reports it is looked up from an in-process ship-type cache keyed by MMSI. 'unknown' if no static report has been observed yet.

geohash5.description: 5-character geohash of the reported (latitude, longitude). Approx. 4.9 km x 4.9 km cells at the equator. For messages without a position, filled from the most recently observed position for the MMSI, falling back to '00000'.

msg_type.description: Kebab-case event family used as the trailing UNS topic segment. Always equals the segment baked into the message's MQTT topic template.

descriptions.position-report: Provider coded value `position-report` for this field.
descriptions.static: Provider coded value `static` for this field.
descriptions.aid-to-navigation: Provider coded value `aid-to-navigation` for this field.

aid_type.description: AtoN type code (0..31) per ITU-R M.1371.

latitude.description: Reported latitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Reported longitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 receive time as supplied by the upstream NMEA tag.

schema.name: PositionReport
schema.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

mmsi.description: Source MMSI as a 9-digit ASCII string (padded with leading zeros). Used as the UNS topic '{mmsi}' placeholder and as the CloudEvents subject.

flag.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lower-case) derived from the first three digits of the MMSI via the ITU MID (Maritime Identification Digit) registry. 'xx' is used for MIDs that do not map to a country.

ship_type.description: Kebab-case ship-type bucket derived from the ITU-R M.1371 ShipType code. For static reports it is derived from the broadcast Type-5/24 ShipType field; for position reports it is looked up from an in-process ship-type cache keyed by MMSI. 'unknown' if no static report has been observed yet.

geohash5.description: 5-character geohash of the reported (latitude, longitude). Approx. 4.9 km x 4.9 km cells at the equator. For messages without a position, filled from the most recently observed position for the MMSI, falling back to '00000'.

msg_type.description: Kebab-case event family used as the trailing UNS topic segment. Always equals the segment baked into the message's MQTT topic template.

descriptions.position-report: Provider coded value `position-report` for this field.
descriptions.static: Provider coded value `static` for this field.
descriptions.aid-to-navigation: Provider coded value `aid-to-navigation` for this field.

latitude.description: Reported latitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Reported longitude in WGS-84 decimal degrees.

true_heading.description: True heading in degrees (0..359, 511 = not available).

navigation_status.description: ITU navigation status code (0..15). 0 for Class-B.

rate_of_turn.description: Rate of turn in AIS-encoded units. 0 for Class-B.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 receive time as supplied by the upstream NMEA tag.

station_id.description: Kystverket base-station identifier from the NMEA tag block.

ais_msg_type.description: Original ITU-R M.1371 message ID (1, 2, 3, 18, or 19).

schema.name: ShipStatic
schema.description: A transport update from the Norwegian Coastal Administration. It carries vessel position and voyage updates for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters.

mmsi.description: Source MMSI as a 9-digit ASCII string (padded with leading zeros). Used as the UNS topic '{mmsi}' placeholder and as the CloudEvents subject.

flag.description: ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code (lower-case) derived from the first three digits of the MMSI via the ITU MID (Maritime Identification Digit) registry. 'xx' is used for MIDs that do not map to a country.

ship_type.description: Kebab-case ship-type bucket derived from the ITU-R M.1371 ShipType code. For static reports it is derived from the broadcast Type-5/24 ShipType field; for position reports it is looked up from an in-process ship-type cache keyed by MMSI. 'unknown' if no static report has been observed yet.

geohash5.description: 5-character geohash of the reported (latitude, longitude). Approx. 4.9 km x 4.9 km cells at the equator. For messages without a position, filled from the most recently observed position for the MMSI, falling back to '00000'.

msg_type.description: Kebab-case event family used as the trailing UNS topic segment. Always equals the segment baked into the message's MQTT topic template.

descriptions.position-report: Provider coded value `position-report` for this field.
descriptions.static: Provider coded value `static` for this field.
descriptions.aid-to-navigation: Provider coded value `aid-to-navigation` for this field.

ship_name.description: Vessel name as broadcast (max 20 chars, trimmed).

callsign.description: Radio call sign as broadcast (max 7 chars).

imo_number.description: IMO number (7-digit). 0 if not assigned or for Class-B.

ship_type_code.description: Raw ITU-R M.1371 ship type code (0..99).

destination.description: Voyage destination string (max 20 chars). Empty for Type 24.

eta.description: Voyage ETA as ISO-8601 string. Empty if absent (Type 24).

draught.description: Maximum present static draught in metres. 0.0 if absent.

dim_to_bow.description: Distance from reference point to bow in metres.

dim_to_stern.description: Distance from reference point to stern in metres.

dim_to_port.description: Distance from reference point to port side in metres.

dim_to_starboard.description: Distance from reference point to starboard side in metres.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 receive time as supplied by the upstream NMEA tag.

ais_msg_type.description: Original ITU-R M.1371 message ID (5 or 24).

description: Kystverket AIS publishes vessel position and voyage updates from the Norwegian Coastal Administration for AIS-equipped vessels in Norwegian waters. These events help consumers monitor mobility operations, passenger information, and traffic conditions without polling the upstream source directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for Kystverket AIS, including upstream feed context and bridge deployment notes.
